Module org.kink_lang.kink

Package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itree

package org.kink_lang.kink.internal.program.itree
Itree (intermediate tree) representation of Kink programs.

Usually, itrees are translated from AST representation, and after optimization is applied, they are translated into instruction sequence. By existence of itree representation, ASTs can be separated from evaluation details.

Itree is similar to GENERIC/GIMPLE in GCC.

  • Class
    Description
    ArgsPassingItree
    Itree for args passing such as [:X :Y :Z] <- \args.
    ArgVecItree
    A context arg vec itree.
    AssignmentItree
    Itree of an assignment.
    BiArithmeticItree
    An arithmetic operation whose second operand is a number literal.
    BiArithmeticItree.Op
    Type of arithmetic operations.
    BindingItree
    An itree of a context binding.
    BranchItree
    Invocation of branch in the following form.
    BranchWithElseItree
    Invocation of branch in the following form.
    CondThenPair
    Cond-then pair of branch.
    ContentAnalysis
    Analyzes contents of local vars in ssa-funs.
    DeepTransformer
    Transforms an itree traversing the sub itrees in the evaluation order.
    DeepTransformer.Callback
    Callback for DeepTransformer.deepTransform(Itree, Callback).
    DerefItree
    A deref itree.
    FastFunItree
    A fun in SSA (static single assignment) form.
    GenericVar
    Generic var.
    IfItree
    An itree of invocation of if preloaded fun.
    Itree
    Itree (intermediate tree) representation of Kink programs.
    ItreeElem
    An elem of vec bodies or actual args.
    ItreeElem.Spread
    ItreeElem of SPREAD type.
    ItreeVisitor<T>
    A visitor of Itrees.
    ItreeWithRhs
    Itree which supports itree.rhs().
    LderefItree
    A lderef itree.
    LetRecItree
    Letrec itree.
    LetRecItree.LvarFunPair
    Pair of local var and the corresponding fun.
    LocalVar
    Sym of a local var.
    LocalVar.Generated
    Sym generated during SSA-conversion.
    LocalVar.Original
    Sym which is specified by the program.
    LocalVarContent
    Analyzed content of a local var.
    LocalVarContent.Alias
    Another local var.
    LocalVarContent.Arg
    The indexed arg in the fun.
    LocalVarContent.Recv
    The recv in the fun.
    LocalVarContent.Unknown
    Unknown content.
    LstoreItree
    Itree of local var assignment such as :X <- 42.
    McallItree
    A mcall itree.
    NadaItree
    A nada itree.
    NestedArgsPassingItree
    Itree of an args passing in the form [:X [:A :B] :Y] <- \args.
    NestedParam
    Algebraic data type of params of NestedArgsPassingItree.
    NestedParam.Tuple
    Param which is a tuple of lvars.
    NestedVecAssignmentItree
    Itree of an args passing in the form [:X [:A :B] :Y] <- Rhs.
    NodeToItreeTranslator
    A function which translates an AST node into an itree.
    NoTraitNewValItree
    Itree of new_val('X' x 'Y' y).
    NumItree
    A num itree.
    OptRestVecAssignmentItree
    Assignment in the form [:A :B :C.opt :D.opt :R.rest] <- xxx.
    OptVecAssignmentItree
    Assignment in the form [:A :B :C.opt :D.opt] <- xxx.
    RecvItree
    A context recv itree.
    RestVecAssignmentItree
    Assignment to a vec in the form [:R.rest] <- xxx.
    SeqItree
    An itree of sequential evaluation; that corresponds to a not-empty seq node.
    SkeltonItreeVisitor<T>
    An itree visitor with a default make.
    SlowFunItree
    A fun itree which is not in SSA (static single assignment) form.
    StoreItree
    Itree of nonlocal var assignment such as B:X <- 42.
    StrItree
    A str itree.
    SymcallItree
    A fun call which is not a method call, and has a sym.
    SymValPair
    Sym-val pair of new_val.
    TraitNewValItree
    Itree of new_val(...
    UsedDefinedVars
    Provides access to used/defined local vars in a fun.
    VarrefItree
    A varref itree.
    VarrefParam
    Algebraic data type of a varref param: local(name) | generic(owner, name).
    VarrefVecAssignmentItree
    Assignment in the form [:Foo X:Bar] <- Rhs.
    VecItree
    A vec itree.
